chapter_title.en: Chapter on Zihar (declaring one's Wife Unlawful Like a mother)

text: 4848 - وَ سَأَلَ إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُظَاهِرُ مِنْ جَارِيَتِهِ فَقَالَ "اَلْحُرَّةُ وَ اَلْأَمَةُ فِي هَذَا سَوَاءٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4848 - Ishaq ibn Ammar asked Abu Ibrahim (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about a man who performs ẓihar (a form of divorce by comparison) against his female slave.
Imam (as) replied: "In this matter, a free woman and a bondwoman are the same."
